faceit.parties.description: Shown when the user is in the party finder section of the website.

faceit.track.description: Shown when the user is viewing their FACEIT stats.

faceit.rank.description: Shown when the user is viewing the leaderboards.

faceit.feed.description: Shown when the user is viewing their social feed.

faceit.clubs.description: Shown when the user is viewing the clubs page.

faceit.club.description: Shown when the user is viewing a specific club.

faceit.matchhistory.description: Shown when the user is viewing their match history.

faceit.inlobby.description: Shown when the user is in a matchmaking lobby.

faceit.queuing.description: Shown when the user is queuing for a match.

faceit.vetoing.description: Shown when the user is vetoing maps before a match.

faceit.watchingVeto.description: Shown when the user is watching the veto process before a match.

faceit.warmup.description: Shown when the user is in the warmup phase of a match.

faceit.competitive.description: Shown when the user is in the competitive phase of a match.

faceit.elo.description: Tooltip that shows the user's ELO rating.

faceit.unranked.description: Tooltip that shows when the user is unranked.

faceit.unknownMap.description: Tooltip that shows when the map being played is unknown.

faceit.unknownClub.description: Tooltip that shows when the club being viewed is unknown.

faceit.won.description: Shown when the user has won a match.

faceit.lost.description: Shown when the user has lost a match.

faceit.finished.description: Shown when the match was finished.

faceit.matchResults.description: Shown when the user is viewing the results of a match.

faceit.matchroom.description: Button label for viewing the matchroom of a match.

faceit.inParty.description: Shown when the user is in a party.
